name: 3pc Resin Moon Kids' Wall Decor Set - Pillowfort™
description: Add a celestial touch to your kid's room with this 3-Piece Resin Moon Wall Decor Set from Pillowfort™. Made of wood, this set showcases three wall decor pieces designed like different moon phases — from full moon to crescent — in black, yellow and blue. Best of all, they feature keyhole hooks at the backs for easy installation.
